headline: AECOM Retains Construction Business: Strategic Win or Risk?
summary: ACM's decision to retain its construction unit signals confidence in profitability, but integration risks may test its higher-margin strategy.

raw.headline: AECOM Retains Construction Business: Strategic Win or Risk?
raw.summary: ACM's decision to retain its construction unit signals confidence in profitability, but integration risks may test its higher-margin strategy.

headline: Jacobs secures role in one of Wisconsin’s largest interstate modernization programs
summary: DALLAS, March 26, 2026--Jacobs (NYSE: J) has been awarded roles on multiple design contracts by the Wisconsin Department of Transportation (WisDOT) to advance modernization and expansion of the I-39/90/94 corridor, one of the state’s most critical and heavily traveled transportation routes. The program will reconstruct and widen key segments to improve safety, ease congestion and support long-term economic growth.
